mapper.insert: INSERT INTO simple_review ( SIMPLE_REVIEW_NO, SIMPLE_REVIEW_MEMBER_ID, SIMPLE_REVIEW_TMDB_MOVIE_ID, SIMPLE_REVIEW_RATING, SIMPLE_REVIEW_CONTENT, SIMPLE_REVIEW_DATE ) VALUES ( simple_review_seq.NEXTVAL, #{simpleReviewMemberId}, #{simpleReviewTmdbMovieId}, #{simpleReviewRating}, #{simpleReviewContent}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT AVG(SIMPLE_REVIEW_RATING) FROM SIMPLE_REVIEW WHERE SIMPLE_REVIEW_TMDB_MOVIE_ID = #{tmdbMovieId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SIMPLE_REVIEW WHERE SIMPLE_REVIEW_TMDB_MOVIE_ID = #{tmdbMovieId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SIMPLE_REVIEW WHERE SIMPLE_REVIEW_TMDB_MOVIE_ID = #{movieId} AND SIMPLE_REVIEW_MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
